description: Drives CUA lights and emissive materials from bundled 1D gradient strips. v2: gradients auto-load on init, targets auto-refresh, clean 4-tab UI (Main / Gradients / Targeting / Advanced), per-channel enable toggles, global speed control.
instructions: Place the var in your AddonPackages folder. Add the plugin to your CUA atom - the bundled gradients load automatically and channels start driving as soon as the asset finishes loading. Use the Gradients tab to swap in your own PNG strips (wide, 1px tall).
